signals.raw:
SOUTH KOREA INFLATION RISES TO 2.2% IN MARCH 2026, BELOW FORECASTS AMID OIL SHOCK | NO | MED confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in prior months, missing market expectations of 2.4% and remaining near the Bank of Korea's 2% target despite global energy volatility from the Iran/Middle East conflict.[1] This data, released around early April 20
